title: Moonlit Monoliths
description: Massive stones channel the moon's power. But is it a blessing, or a curse?
body:
![Moolit Monolith](https://joshie.app/files/moonlit.png) [![joshie-app](https://joshie.app/files/joshie_app_download.svg)](https://joshie.app/mods/moonlit-monoliths) [![discord-plural](https://joshie.app/files/discord_join.svg)](https://discord.gg/HUMbRQhxdR)         [![paypal-plural](https://joshie.app/files/payppal_me.svg)](https://paypal.me/joshieman)         [![youtube-plural](https://joshie.app/files/youtube_banner.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/@joshieman)

Massive stones channel the power of the moon. Activates with a flash of lightning, glowing different colors depending on the effect it is giving. A blessing, or a curse?

 

 

Features

New Structure: Moonlit Monoliths Generates using the vanilla #is_mountain tag. 

Gives various buffs or debuffs depending on the phase of the moon.

Effects

White (Full Moon): Weakness

Light Blue (Waxing/Waning Gibbous/Crescent): Haste

Blue (First/Third Quarter): Speed

Red (New Moon): Strength

 

Compatibility

Compatible with any world-gen or biome if they modify the vanilla tags.

Vanilla Friendly

Uses only vanilla blocks.
